creator: lobo@bsd.com.br
text:
Hi.

Despite the fact that the VM starts and works fine, if it has an adapter with Host-only network, after the VM shuts down, the process VBoxNetDHCP (vboxnet0) keeps stuck, consuming 100% of the core it is working from, and it can only be killed by a reboot.

All other adapters have been working fine so far.
